title: Yijing Hexagram 54: Gui Mei (The Marrying Maiden)
description: Hexagram 54 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.
introduction: Hexagram 54 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.

translation.text: The Marrying Maiden. Undertakings bring misfortune. Nothing that would further.
